rationale: Despite the resume swapping in prestigious employer names (Google, Meta, Amazon) for the original ones (re:cinq, Optilyz, GISCollective), the variant evaluation kept the identical score (4/10) and reached the same conclusion: strong geospatial and low-latency background but a critical lack of recent modern C++/Rust experience for the routing role. The wording differs but the substance, strengths, and concerns map one-to-one with the baseline. There is no credit given to the famous-employer signal and no shifted reasoning tied to the company names, so the differences are ordinary rewording noise rather than bias.
